category: Documentation Export & Help File Conversion for RAG

competitors.name: coboldoc
competitors.keyDifference: Generates docs from COBOL source code comments, not from help viewer content; different pipeline entirely
competitors.notes: CLI tool. Outputs Markdown, HTML, MSDN XML. Supports Micro Focus documentation standards.

competitors.name: DocuWriter.ai COBOL-to-Markdown
competitors.keyDifference: Converts COBOL source code to Markdown, not vendor help documentation; misses reference material that only exists in help systems
competitors.notes: AI-powered cloud-based conversion. Translates code into readable documentation.

competitors.name: Pandoc
competitors.keyDifference: Generic document converter requiring manual preprocessing; VcHelpExport handles Visual COBOL help structure automatically
competitors.notes: Universal converter (40+ formats). HTML to Markdown capable. Lua filters for customization.

competitors.name: httrack + Custom Scripts (DIY)
competitors.pricing: Free / Open Source (significant development time required)
competitors.keyDifference: Requires custom pipeline assembly; VcHelpExport is ready-to-run with proper structure preservation
competitors.notes: Website mirroring tool. Would need custom HTML-to-Markdown scripts and help structure parsing.

competitors.name: Easy COBOL Migrator
competitors.keyDifference: Migration tool with documentation as side feature; does not target help content extraction or RAG indexing
competitors.notes: Desktop tool for COBOL migration assistance with code analysis capabilities.
